summary:
A special interest in laparoscopy does not impact the treatment of acute cholecystitis; instead, management depends on objective clinical criteria such as disease severity and patient stabilization. Laparoscopic cholecystectomy remains the established standard care regardless of surgeon specialization preferences. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$
